title: How many faces does Sachiel have The Great Dilemma
display_title: How many faces does Sachiel have The Great Dilemma
wikitext:
[]: How many faces does Sachiel have? (The Great Dilemma)             Quote Post by flatulant » Mon Jan 01, 2007 10:09 am Okay, I'm confused about this. In some official drawings, Sachiel has 1 face, but in others, he has 2. Is this some production error? Why does his amount of faces keep fluctuating? Help please!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 01, 2007 10:14 am After he walks on the N2 Mine and gets some serious owies, he does some regeneration business. During this, his original, long-beaked face lifts up and shifts over to the side; a new, short-beaked face emerges from below. So... Pre-N2 Mine: 1 face Post-N2 Mine: 2 faces

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Mon Jan 01, 2007 10:16 am Ah, okay, thanks. This has been bothering me for a while.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jan 01, 2007 1:26 pm Reichu wrote: a new, short-beaked face emerges from below

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Mon Jan 01, 2007 2:01 pm I think she suggested at one point that the beak might continually grow little by little (like fingernails or rodents' teeth). Ergo, old face has long beak, brand new face has a short one.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 01, 2007 7:53 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Although, I would suggest that it's possible that the second face hadn't fully teethed through. Regenerating with alteration doesn't quite sound right to me.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Tue Jan 02, 2007 12:43 am Reichu wrote: ...I have no idea why his new face would look different, and why the old one would just hang around. I've whimsically speculated that the old one would eventually fall off and the beak of the new would 'grow out'.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 02, 2007 4:11 am QUIET! I CAN'T HEAR MYSELF FANWANK!!! ;)

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Tue Jan 02, 2007 2:54 pm Oh, uh, then, it's a hint indicating the importance of the kilroy/owl face to drive home the point that all the angels have one somewhere, even if we can't see it. Sachael has 2 do too the faces being it's source of energy and it needing extra energy to regenerate. Or meh. I don't think the concept of it just regenrating is something we need to fanwank into something more than it is. Gendo says it has the ability to regenerate, and Sachiel demonstrates this most obviously by growing a new "face" since the old one was damaged. I don't see why it needs an explanation beyond that. If we really want to think about the style of the show at that point, it's a lot more important for it to be something that looks cool, since they're pretending the show is about giant fighting robots.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Jan 02, 2007 3:53 pm I believe the reason sachiel grew a new face was to improve his fighting power after he got creamed by the N2 mine. This was sort of implied when gendo said something about sachiel not making a good "autonomous weapon" if he couldnt improve himself right after he came out of the explosion. The improvements are obvious in that he would have more then one face to shoot eyebeams out of. So if my theories correct, each time sacheil gets beat up he'll get a bit stronger, too bad he didnt survive getting his ass kicked by 01.

[]:             Quote Post by Shwiggie » Wed Jan 03, 2007 1:03 am Think of the long-nose face as a giant scab.
